description.en: Create a new prediction market on Polymarket. Define the market question, outcomes, and resolution criteria using the Gamma API.
description.de: Erstelle einen neuen Prognosemarkt auf Polymarket. Definiere die Marktfrage, Ergebnisse und Auflösungskriterien über die Gamma-API.
description.es: Create a new prediction market on Polymarket. Define the market question, outcomes, and resolution criteria using the Gamma API.

description.ro: Create a new prediction market on Polymarket. Define the market question, outcomes, and resolution criteria using the Gamma API.
description.it: Create a new prediction market on Polymarket. Define the market question, outcomes, and resolution criteria using the Gamma API.

vars.API_KEY: env:POLYMARKET_API_KEY|Get your API key from Polymarket at https://polymarket.com/settings/api
